Documentation

CodeMirrorOptionIds

com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorOptionIds
No inheritance
Subclasses
Class has no sub classes.
Dependencies
Class has no dependencies.
Import code
var CodeMirrorOptionIds = dbm.importClass("com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorOptionIds");
Full code
dbm.registerClass("com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorOptionIds", null, function(objectFunctions, staticFunctions, ClassReference) { //console.log("com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorOptionIds"); var CodeMirrorOptionIds = dbm.importClass("com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorOptionIds"); staticFunctions.VALUE = "value"; staticFunctions.MODE = "mode"; staticFunctions.THEME = "theme"; staticFunctions.INDENT_UNIT = "indentUnit"; staticFunctions.SMART_INDENT = "smartIndent"; staticFunctions.TAB_SIZE = "tabSize"; staticFunctions.INDENT_WITH_TABS = "indentWithTabs"; staticFunctions.ELECTRIC_CHARACTERS = "electricChars"; staticFunctions.SPECIAL_CHARACTERS = "specialChars"; staticFunctions.SPECIAL_CHARACTER_PLACEHOLDER = "specialCharPlaceholder"; staticFunctions.RTL_MOVE_VISUALLY = "rtlMoveVisually"; staticFunctions.KEY_MAP = "keyMap"; staticFunctions.EXTRA_KEYS = "extraKeys"; staticFunctions.LINE_WRAPPING = "lineWrapping"; staticFunctions.LINE_NUMBERS = "lineNumbers"; staticFunctions.FIRST_LINE_NUMBER = "firstLineNumber"; staticFunctions.LINE_NUMBER_FORMATTER = "lineNumberFormatter"; staticFunctions.GUTTERS = "gutters"; staticFunctions.FIXED_GUTTER = "fixedGutter"; staticFunctions.COVER_GUTTER_NEXT_TO_SCROLLBAR = "coverGutterNextToScrollbar"; staticFunctions.READ_ONLY = "readOnly"; staticFunctions.SHOW_CURSOR_WHEN_SELECTING = "showCursorWhenSelecting"; staticFunctions.UNDO_DEPTH = "undoDepth"; staticFunctions.HISTORY_EVENT_DELAY = "historyEventDelay"; staticFunctions.TAB_INDEX = "tabindex"; staticFunctions.AUTO_FOCUS = "autofocus"; staticFunctions.DRAG_DROP = "dragDrop"; staticFunctions.CURSOR_BLINK_RATE = "cursorBlinkRate"; staticFunctions.CURSOR_SCROLL_MARGIN = "cursorScrollMargin"; staticFunctions.CURSOR_HEIGHT = "cursorHeight"; staticFunctions.RESET_SELECTION_ON_CONTEXT_MENU = "resetSelectionOnContextMenu"; staticFunctions.POLL_INTERVAL = "pollInterval"; staticFunctions.FLATTEN_SPANS = "flattenSpans"; staticFunctions.ADD_MODE_CLASS = "addModeClass"; staticFunctions.MAX_HIGHLIGHT_LENGTH = "maxHighlightLength"; staticFunctions.CRUDE_MEASURING_FROM = "crudeMeasuringFrom"; staticFunctions.VIEWPORT_MARGIN = "viewportMargin"; })
